age_limit.age_details: As per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-servicemen
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GoI norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-servicemen

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Technology, Master’s degree, Diploma in Engineering
qualification.details: Institute Engineer: Bachelor’s degree in the appropriate branch of Engineering / Technology or equivalent from a recognized University/Institute with at least 60% in the qualifying degree. At least 15 years relevant experience out of which at least 05 years as Executive Engineer or equivalent post in the Pay Matrix Level 12 or above. Assistant Registrar: Master degree or its equivalent in any discipline from a recognized University with 60% marks and above or its equivalent Grade B in the UGC seven-point scale and consistently good academic record. At least 05 years relevant administrative experience in supervisory capacity in a Govt. office/university/technological institution or an organization of repute. Assistant Engineer (Civil): Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks and at least 05 years’ experience as Junior Engineer (Civil) or equivalent post in Pay Matrix Level 6 or equivalent. OR Three years Diploma in Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks and at least 08 years’ experience as Junior Engineer (Civil) or equivalent. Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks and at least 05 years’ experience as Junior Engineer (Electrical) or equivalent post in Pay Matrix Level 6 or equivalent. OR Three years Diploma in Electrical Engineering with minimum 60% marks and at least 08 years’ experience as Junior Engineer (Electrical) or equivalent. Junior Engineer (Civil): Bachelor Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks and at least 02 years’ experience in execution of civil works and estimation and billing of civil works in Pay Matrix Level 4 or equivalent. OR Three years Diploma in Civil Engineering with minimum 60% marks and at least 05 years’ experience. Junior Engineer (Mechanical): Bachelor Degree in Mechanical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks and at least 02 years’ experience in execution of mechanical works and estimation and billing of mechanical works in Pay Matrix Level 4 or equivalent. OR Three years Diploma in Mechanical Engineering with minimum 60% marks and at least 05 years’ experience.

salary_details.details: Institute Engineer: Level 13 (₹118500-₹214100) Assistant Registrar: Level-10 (₹56100-₹177500) Assistant Engineer (Civil): Level-8 (₹47600-₹151100) Assistant Engineer (Electrical): Level-8 (₹47600-₹151100) Junior Engineer (Civil): Level-6 (₹35400-₹112400) Junior Engineer (Mechanical): Level-6 (₹35400-₹112400)

selection_process: Screening Written Test Proficiency Test Computer Test Presentation Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 13-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jammu Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Jammu recruitment is 13th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 8 vacancies are available for various posts, including Institute Engineer, Assistant Registrar, Assistant Engineer, and Junior Engineer positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Institute Engineer post?
faq.answer: For the Institute Engineer post, a Bachelor’s degree in the appropriate branch of Engineering/Technology with at least 60% marks and 15 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs.1000/- for Group A posts and Rs.500/- for Group B & C posts.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any relaxations in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-servicemen candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Level 6 to Level 13 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), with specific pay scales mentioned for each post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves screening, followed by a written test, proficiency test, computer test, presentation, interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Jammu and Kashmir apply?
faq.answer: Yes, the recruitment is open to eligible candidates from all over India, provided they meet the specified eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q9. How can I check the detailed eligibility criteria for each post?
faq.answer: The detailed eligibility criteria for each post are provided in the official notification PDF, which can be accessed through the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any processing fee for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST and Women candidates are exempt from the application fee but need to pay a processing fee of Rs.200/-.
